description_long: This is a military jet aircraft with a streamlined fuselage painted in a camouflage pattern of green, gray, and blue, featuring roundel insignias and fin flashes typical of the Royal Air Force. The airplane has a pointed nose, a bubble canopy cockpit positioned near the front, and swept-back wings mounted low on the fuselage. Twin air intakes are visible on either side of the cockpit, and the aircraft is equipped with a tricycle landing gear configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose wheel. The tail section features a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with the vertical fin displaying a prominent insignia. The jet exhaust is located at the rear, and the overall design suggests a focus on maneuverability and speed.
description: A camouflaged military jet aircraft with swept-back low wings, a bubble canopy cockpit, and tricycle landing gear, marked with Royal Air Force insignia.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pointed nose, bubble canopy, and left wing with visible landing gear and roundel insignia.
description_view_1: Left-rear view highlighting the tail section, vertical stabilizer with fin flash, and the left wing's full span.
description_view_2: Right-rear view displaying the jet exhaust, right wing, and both horizontal and vertical stabilizers with insignia.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the cockpit, right wing, and nose wheel, with the camouflage pattern clearly visible.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine with intake on either side of the fuselage, exhaust at the rear.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units under the wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely single-seat, with clear forward and side visibility.
